nasb.text: Samson said to her, “If they bind me with seven fresh cords that have not been dried, then I will become weak and be like any other man.”

esv.text: Samson said to her, “If they bind me with seven fresh bowstrings that have not been dried, then I shall become weak and be like any other man.”

cnv.text: 參孫對她說：“如果人用七條未乾的青繩子捆綁我，我就會軟弱無力，像平常人一樣。”

ccb.text: 参孙说：“如果我被七根还没干的青绳子绑着，我的力气便会和普通人一样。”
